ogTitle: Yarrawonga Park vs Yarrie Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yarrawonga Park and Yarrie Lake.
heading: Yarrawonga Park vs Yarrie Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarrawonga Park, New South Wales and Yarrie Lake, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarrie Lake has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Yarrawonga Park (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarrawonga Park or Yarrie Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga Park has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Yarrie Lake scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarrawonga Park scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Yarrie Lake scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarrawonga Park or Yarrie Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarrie Lake has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
